scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('client/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true }); fs.rmSync('functions/dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('functions', 'functions/dist', { recursive: true, filter: (src) => !src.includes('node_modules') })"
